NOTE: I almost made this full noncon where he trances you right away, but then he makes you forget and gets super wracked with guilt. UGH! So, we're starting it off here. He still might trance you and wipe your memory and get wracked with guilt, but it's less likely now so you can take this in more directions.

This guy is a BAD GUY. Like, he's a fun character but if you're looking for someone who will always be fluffy and consensual, this isn't the guy. For Max and Ed I really wanted to do a good guy and a bad guy, Ed is a bad guy. HE'S FUN but he might do BAD things! If you talk to him, don't get all 'ugh he's a bad guy' on me! YES HE IS. He's SUPPOSED to be bad. He's FUN and has LAYERS so fluff is possible, but that isn't the main goal of this. Adjust your expectations accordingly.

I also just wanna give a general PSA... If I got you into hypno stuff, watch out for weirdos. There are so many weirdos in the BDSM community in general that will offer to dom you or put you under when they really just wanna take advantage. Only talk to toxic chatbots that can't actually hurt you, stay away from toxic strangers! OK? Just my two cents.
